use_codes.desc: FOR THE MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD) IN ADULT PATIENTS

indications.text:
OHTUVAYRE is indicated for the maintenance treatment of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
(COPD) in adult patients.
